title: Campground Check-in
scene: 你开车到州立公园营地办理入住。

turns.en: Do you have a reservation?
Yes, Zhang Wei, two nights, site twelve.

turns.cn: 请填表，禁止明火，用火在指定炉。
turns.en: Please sign in. No open flames except at designated grills.
Is there drinking water nearby?

turns.cn: 水龙头在营地入口，厕所在那边。
turns.en: Spigots at the entrance. Restrooms are over there.
What should we know about bears?

turns.cn: 食物锁熊箱，垃圾别留外面。
turns.en: Store food in bear boxes. Don't leave trash outside.

title: Setting Up Tent
scene: 你第一次露营，向邻营求助搭帐篷。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这帐篷杆怎么穿？
turns.en: Sorry, how do these poles go together?

turns.cn: 先把两根长的交叉，插进四角。
turns.en: Cross the long ones first, then slot them into the corners.
How deep should I hammer the stakes?
At least halfway in. Tighten the guy lines.
Will it get cold tonight?

turns.cn: 降到四十多华氏度，睡袋要够温标。
turns.en: Down to the forties. Make sure your bag is rated for it.
Thanks a lot!

title: Hiking Trail
scene: 你在游客中心咨询徒步路线。

turns.cn: 有没有半天能走完的路线？
turns.en: Is there a half-day hike?

turns.cn: 瀑布步道，四英里来回，中等难度。
turns.en: Waterfall Trail, four miles round trip, moderate.
Do we need trekking poles?
Recommended. The last section is steep.
Do we get maps here?

turns.cn: 免费，记得带水，下午雷雨。
turns.en: Free maps. Bring water. Thunderstorms possible this afternoon.
Got it. Thank you.

title: Campfire Cooking
scene: 你在营地用篝火烤棉花糖，和邻居聊天。

turns.en: First time roasting marshmallows?
Yes. How do you do it right?

turns.cn: 离火远一点，转着烤，外面焦里面软。
turns.en: Hold it farther from the flame, rotate until crispy outside and gooey inside.
Sandwich it in graham crackers for s'mores, right?
Right, with a piece of chocolate.
Smells amazing!
One of the best parts of camping.

title: Renting Gear
scene: 你在户外店租露营装备。

turns.en: Renting a tent or sleeping bags?

turns.cn: 四人帐加两个睡袋，周末两天。
turns.en: A four-person tent and two bags for the weekend.

turns.cn: 一共七十五，押金一百可退。
turns.en: Seventy-five total. A hundred refundable deposit.
Do you rent camp stoves?
Yes, ten a day. Fuel canisters sold separately.
We'll return everything Sunday at six PM.
Sounds good. Fifteen extra per late day.
